response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong full-stack engineering capabilities and excellent communication skills, they fundamentally lack the core mandatory requirements. Their C++ experience is minimal (academic projects and a brief LabWindows assignment) rather than the required 5–10 years of professional development. They have no demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains. Their career trajectory is explicitly away from systems-level C++ development toward modern web and cloud technologies, making this a poor technical fit despite their overall competence.
strengths: Excellent communication and knowledge-sharing demonstrated through multiple workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
Proven expertise in CI/CD pipelines, DevOps infrastructure, and deployment automation across multiple platforms
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, pair programming, and trunk-based development
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (only academic and brief professional LabWindows work, far short of the required 5–10 years of professional development)
No demonstrated experience in capital markets, fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking domains
Career trajectory moving away from systems programming toward web/cloud technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang); no recent Windows platform development

key_factors.factor: Capital Markets / Fixed Income Domain Expertise
